title: MC Particle Cap++
description: This is a mod which increases the minecraft particle cap,it is a client side mod,this mod allows you to spawn more particles than you would normally.
body:
This client side mod allows you to increase the minecraft particle cap!
If you want this to be a offical feature in minecraft, 
Vote for this post I found covering particle suggestions: https://feedback.minecraft.net/hc/en-us/community/posts/39039315922701-Add-Minecraft-particle-scaling-Remove-the-Minecraft-Particle-cap
